历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3945→3533→3160→2453→1534, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 4 years, the cumulative advancement is about 2411 places, with a baseline of approximately 1534 in 2025, indicating intensifying competition. From 2021 to 2023, the Physics Category enrollment plan was 96 students each year, dropping to 91 in 2024 and 76 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 85 students, an increase of about 11.8% compared to 2025. This expansion helps alleviate competitive pressure, but the expansion rate is smaller than the recent pace of ranking advancement.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 14th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (from 19th in 2021 to 14th in 2026), with rankings continuously rising in recent years. The school is firmly in the first tier among domestic science and engineering universities. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics and school management public opinion, but the school's response to public opinion has been relatively swift. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating moderate application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, and 12 other disciplines have been rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from about 391,200 in 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 64%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 252,000, indicating a slight expansion of the competition base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 426 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (intensifying competition), the approximately 11.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates, and the somewhat negative school reputation, the expansion effect and the intensifying competition trend offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1534 to approximately 1623. The predicted range is 1428–1818.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1428–1818, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors (Future Precision Engineering Technology, Xu Teli Talent Class) as ambitious targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1400), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1427 → 1480 → 1372 → 1285 → 1217, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). Over the past three years, the cumulative forward shift is about 155 places, with a baseline of approximately 1217 in 2025. Enrollment plans for History Category were 12, 11, and 11 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly increased to 21 in 2024 and 27 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 33, an increase of about 22.2% over 2025, marking three consecutive years of significant expansion, which greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 14th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, placing it in the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion on teacher ethics and school management, but overall response to public opinion is relatively standardized. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), indicating above-average application attention. Although primarily focused on science and engineering, it has strong management science and engineering (A) and business administration (A-) disciplines, supporting the Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics direction) for History Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences direction, Management and Economics direction) has generally stable social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 36%, the estimated number of History Category examinees is about 142,000, roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 442 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating forward trend of historical rankings, the significant 22.2% expansion in 2026 (substantially alleviating competition), the roughly unchanged total number of examinees, and the somewhat negative university reputation, the expansion effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1217 to approximately 1394. The predicted range is 1227–1561.
